changeSet.author: tsaktsirasl@unisystems.gr
tsaktsirasl@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO request_payment_bank_account_details( id, competent_authority, sort_code, account_number, account_name, iban, swift_code) VALUES(nextval('request_payment_bank_account_details_seq'), 'ENGLAND', '60-70-80', '10014411', 'Environment Agency', 'GB23NWBK60708010014411', 'NWBKGB2L');

changeSet.author: tsaktsirasl@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO request_payment_fee_method(id, competent_authority, request_type_id, type) SELECT nextval('request_payment_fee_method_seq'), 'ENGLAND', r.id, 'STANDARD' FROM request_type r WHERE r.code = 'DOE';

changeSet.author: tsaktsirasl@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO request_payment_fee_method(id, competent_authority, request_type_id, type) SELECT nextval('request_payment_fee_method_seq'), 'ENGLAND', r.id, 'STANDARD' FROM request_type r WHERE r.code = 'EMP_ISSUANCE';
INSERT INTO request_payment_fee(fee_method_id, type, amount) SELECT id , 'FIXED', '2246' FROM request_payment_fee_method WHERE competent_authority = 'ENGLAND' AND request_type_id in (SELECT r.id FROM request_type r WHERE r.code = 'EMP_ISSUANCE');

rollback.sql:
DELETE FROM request_payment_fee WHERE fee_method_id = (SELECT id FROM request_payment_fee_method WHERE competent_authority = 'ENGLAND' AND request_type_id in (SELECT r.id FROM request_type r WHERE r.code = 'EMP_ISSUANCE'));
DELETE FROM request_payment_fee_method WHERE competent_authority = 'ENGLAND' AND request_type_id in (SELECT r.id FROM request_type r WHERE r.code = 'EMP_ISSUANCE';);

changeSet.author: tsaktsirasl@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO request_payment_fee_method(id, competent_authority, request_type_id, type) SELECT nextval('request_payment_fee_method_seq'), 'ENGLAND', r.id, 'STANDARD' FROM request_type r WHERE r.code = 'EMP_VARIATION'; INSERT INTO request_payment_fee(fee_method_id, type, amount) SELECT id , 'FIXED', '0' FROM request_payment_fee_method WHERE competent_authority = 'ENGLAND' AND request_type_id in (SELECT r.id FROM request_type r WHERE r.code = 'EMP_VARIATION');

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM request_payment_fee WHERE fee_method_id = (SELECT id FROM request_payment_fee_method WHERE competent_authority = 'ENGLAND' AND request_type_id in (SELECT r.id FROM request_type r WHERE r.code = 'EMP_VARIATION')); DELETE FROM request_payment_fee_method WHERE competent_authority = 'ENGLAND' AND request_type_id in (SELECT r.id FROM request_type r WHERE r.code = 'EMP_VARIATION';);

changeSet.author: P44065
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO request_payment_bank_account_details( id, competent_authority, sort_code, account_number, account_name) VALUES(nextval('request_payment_bank_account_details_seq'), 'SCOTLAND', '83-34-00', '137187', 'Scottish Environment Protection Agency');

changeSet.author: P44065
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO request_payment_bank_account_details( id, competent_authority, sort_code, account_number, account_name, iban, swift_code) VALUES(nextval('request_payment_bank_account_details_seq'), 'NORTHERN_IRELAND', '950121', '61253506', 'DAERA General Account', 'GB67DABA95012161253506', 'DABAGB2B');

changeSet.author: P44065
changeSet.sql: UPDATE request_payment_fee SET amount= 2331.35 WHERE fee_method_id = ( SELECT rpfm.id FROM request_payment_fee_method rpfm INNER JOIN request_type rt ON rt.id = rpfm.request_type_id WHERE competent_authority = 'ENGLAND' AND rt.code = 'EMP_ISSUANCE');

rollback.sql: UPDATE request_payment_fee SET amount= 2246 WHERE fee_method_id = ( SELECT rpfm.id FROM request_payment_fee_method rpfm INNER JOIN request_type rt ON rt.id = rpfm.request_type_id WHERE competent_authority = 'ENGLAND' AND rt.code = 'EMP_ISSUANCE');
